message:
test(wave-26): add 24 tests for trace compat + delta_debug type invariants

trace/compat.rs: 15 tests covering CompatibilityResult Debug/Clone/Eq
for all variants, check_schema_compatibility version 0, CompatEvent
Debug for Event/Skipped, CompatStats Default/Clone/Debug/has_issues,
record_skipped with None type, TraceMigrator Default trait.

trace/delta_debug.rs: 9 tests covering DeltaDebugConfig Debug/Clone/
Default field values, MinimizationStats Debug/Clone/Default/Serialize,
DeltaDebugResult Debug/Display format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
